description: Fetch events for MessageTrace API (Graph API)
name: Fetch events from MessageTrace API (Graph API)

tenant_id.description: The ID of the corresponding Tenant

client_secret.description: The password associated with the account

timedelta.description: The temporal shift, in the past, in minutes, the connector applies when fetching the events (default to 5 minutes ago)

start_time.description: The number of hours from which events should be queried.

chunk_size.description: The size of chunks for the batch processing

intake_key.description: Intake key to use when sending events
